name: Drip
description: Fresh paint running down the wall — streams lengthen and droplets let go a little further on every redraw.

code.style: --dropOp: @p(0, 1, 1); --rule: ( /* the droplet hangs from the same emitted stream geometry and shares its color */ --paint: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --dpx: @r(14, 62); --dpw: @r(12, 26); --dph: @r(20, 82); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--dpx) * 1%); top: -2%; width: calc(@var(--dpw) * 1%); height: calc(@var(--dph) * 1%); background: @var(--paint); border-radius: 0 0 99px 99px; transition: ease 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc((@var(--dpx) + @var(--dpw) / 2) * 1% - 4%); top: calc(@var(--dph) * 1% + 4%); @size: 8%; background: @var(--paint); border-radius: 50%; opacity: var(--dropOp); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
